scripts.build: npm run build -w client && cargo build --release --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml
scripts.start: npm run build && cargo run --release --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml
scripts.package:win: npm run build -w client && cargo wix --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml --nocapture
scripts.package:mac: npm run build -w client && cargo bundle --release --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml
scripts.package:linux: npm run build -w client && cargo deb --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml
